meta.title: Silas — Content system
meta.description: Dashboard for content intelligence, generation, and scheduling.

common.showingPage: Showing {shown} of {pageTotal} on this page ({total} total)
common.creatorAddedPick: Creator added — select them from the list.
common.creatorNameRequired: Enter a name for this creator.
common.creatorAddFailed: Couldn't add creator — that name or slug may already exist.

nav.creator: Creator
nav.noCreators: No creators in this workspace yet.
nav.name: Name

auth.signInSubtitle: New here? Sign up and complete onboarding to create your org and creator. Returning users: pick the active creator from the bar at the top of the app — all requests use that client.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Next you'll create your workspace and complete onboarding.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

dashboard.heroDraftReadySub: Made for your voice. Review and post.
dashboard.heroDraftPreparingSub: Open the studio to watch Silas finish your script — usually under a minute.
dashboard.heroNextPostSub: A proven style you can make yours today.
dashboard.heroStartSub: Paste a reel you like, or finish setup so we can find winners for you.
dashboard.momentumPosts: {count, plural, one {You've made 1 post with Silas} other {You've made # posts with Silas}}
dashboard.momentumNone: Your first post is one tap away
dashboard.scoutEmpty: Scout is still gathering reels. Finish setup or open the full catalog to browse everything.
dashboard.watchingAccounts: Watching {count} {count, plural, one {account} other {accounts}} · {new} new this week
dashboard.studiedReels: Studied {count} of your reels · avg {views} views
dashboard.noDraftsYet: No drafts yet. Start a new post above.
dashboard.breakoutsSpotted: {count} {count, plural, one {breakout} other {breakouts}} spotted in your niche this cycle.

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.noWorkspaceTitle: We can't see a workspace for this login
intelligence.noWorkspaceBody: Your account isn't linked to a workspace yet. If you're new here, create one below. If you already set one up, try signing out and back in, or contact support if it keeps happening.
intelligence.loadError: Some data couldn't be loaded. Try refreshing.
intelligence.needsCreator: This page needs an active creator in the top bar.
intelligence.noWorkspaceHint: No workspace for this login — see the alert above.
intelligence.missingOrg: Missing organization — refresh the page or sign in again.
intelligence.pickCreator: Pick a creator in the top bar or finish onboarding.
intelligence.refreshHint: Pull the latest reels and numbers from Instagram.
intelligence.lastRefreshedStale: Last refreshed {ago} — may be out of date
intelligence.lastRefreshedEmbeddedStale: Last refreshed {ago} · tap Refresh when you want new numbers
intelligence.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
intelligence.noHistory: No history yet — refresh data to start tracking views over time.

generate.title: New reel, cover or carousel
generate.subtitle: Start from an idea or recreate a winning reel — angles, script, and render in one flow.
generate.noActiveClient: No active client in workspace — complete onboarding or switch client.
generate.loadingSessionHint: Pulling angles, script, and render status.
generate.noSessions: No sessions yet — generate angles above to start your first post.
generate.generationFailedPickAngle: Pick an angle below to try again.
generate.regenerateEverythingBody: This overwrites hooks, script, caption, and on-screen text together. Your background and render are kept.
generate.deleteSessionBody: Removes this generation session and its drafts. This can't be undone.
generate.renderingHint: Usually 1–3 minutes (this page polls for up to ~10 min). You can leave and come back.
generate.outputNotReadyHint: Go back to the Reel tab, choose a background, then render the video. The final MP4, cover, caption, and post preview will appear here.
generate.outputSubtitle: Final MP4, cover, caption, and post preview.
generate.outputExpired: Video was rendered and cleaned up after 30 days.
generate.reelStudioHint: Edit the on-screen text, background, look, and timing while the preview stays visible.
generate.pickBackgroundToRender: Pick a background (clip, photo, or AI) to enable render.
generate.onScreenTextHint: Hook and beat text. Keep each line short enough to read in under 2 seconds.
generate.noNextSteps: No next steps configured yet — add them in Settings.
generate.noCarouselStyles: No carousel styles yet — add examples in Media.
generate.noCoverStyles: No cover styles yet — add examples in Media.

settings.title: Settings
settings.contentDefaultsDesc: Set where viewers should go next, plus the visual styles to reuse when creating new posts.
settings.nicheProfileDesc: Identity keywords and hashtags used for competitor discovery and Intelligence chips. Edit by re-running generation after your reels change.
settings.apiKeyDesc: For integrations and advanced use: your secret key and organization slug. Keep them private.
settings.noNicheProfile: No niche profile yet. Run Re-generate after your reels change.

media.title: Media
media.subtitle: Outputs from Create plus uploaded images and clips.
media.noRenders: No renders yet — finish a post in Create.

scheduling.title: Post to Instagram
scheduling.subtitle: Silas prepares your video and caption — you publish from the Instagram app.
scheduling.downloadStep: Finish a render in Create, open the Output tab, and tap Download MP4.
scheduling.copyCaptionStep: Use Copy caption on the same screen — hashtags included.
scheduling.trendingSoundStep: In Instagram, add a trending sound after uploading. Reels with native audio perform better.
scheduling.roadmapStep: Direct scheduling from Silas is on the roadmap — not available yet.
scheduling.rendersInMedia: Your finished renders also live under Media if you need them later.

instagramChecklist.title: Post to Instagram
instagramChecklist.step1: Download your MP4 from the Output tab
instagramChecklist.step2: Open Instagram and create a new Reel
instagramChecklist.step3: Upload the video from your camera roll
instagramChecklist.step5: Add a trending sound, then publish

onboarding.stepWorkspaceDesc: Start with the creator profile Silas will use to find opportunities and generate your first post.
onboarding.stepQuizTitle: Tell us about you — in your own words
onboarding.stepQuizDesc: Record one voice memo or type your answers. We build your ICP, Brand Map, Storyboard, and Communication Guideline from it.
onboarding.stepSourceDesc: Answer a few quick questions or paste notes — we turn your answers into strategy docs Silas can use.
onboarding.stepStrategyDesc: Review what Silas understood. Keep it lightweight now; you can refine the full brain later.
onboarding.stepPipelineDesc: We're reading your niche, finding similar creators, and preparing content options worth acting on.
onboarding.stepReelReviewDesc: Vote on the best opportunities. Silas learns what feels on-brand before creating anything for you.
onboarding.stepFirstContentDesc: Choose the opportunity you want Silas to turn into your first export-ready content piece.
onboarding.stepEditorDesc: Refine the copy, visuals, cover, and caption. When the export is ready, your dashboard unlocks.
onboarding.stepActionPlanDesc: A concrete 7-day plan based on your Creator Brain, taste votes, and first generation session.
onboarding.stepTourDesc: Open the full studio. Intelligence, Create, and Creator Brain are now connected.
onboarding.pipelineKeywordsHint: Quick examples from your topic keywords
onboarding.returnToOnboardingAnytime: — you can return to onboarding anytime
onboarding.floatInstagramDetail: Posts, captions, and audience reactions ready to analyze.
onboarding.floatCommentsDetail: Real follower phrases, objections, and content requests.
onboarding.floatReachDetail: A reel performing above baseline in the same niche.
onboarding.floatFollowerDetail: Growth tied to formats worth adapting, not copying.
onboarding.voiceQuestionsHeading: Your questions — answer all in one take
onboarding.voiceAnswerThisThenNext: Answer this one aloud, then tap Next — recording stays on.
onboarding.voicePreviewHint: Read through each question, then start recording below.
onboarding.voiceAllQuestionsSeen: Last question — finish your answer, then tap Stop & transcribe below.
onboarding.voicePressRecord: Press record and talk through the questions
onboarding.voiceMemoHint: One continuous recording. Step through the questions above while you talk — we split your answers afterward.
onboarding.voiceRecordingTooShort: Recording too short — try again and speak for at least a few seconds.
onboarding.voiceMicDenied: Microphone access denied. Use “Type instead” below or allow mic access.
onboarding.voiceRecordingTruncated: Only {captured}s of audio was captured (timer showed {shown}). Keep this tab active, check your mic, and record again.
onboarding.voiceRecorderError: Recording failed in the browser — please try again.
onboarding.voiceMicDisconnected: Microphone stopped unexpectedly. Check your mic and record again with this tab kept open.
onboarding.voiceReviewDesc: Fix names, offers, or anything the transcript got wrong. Each card maps to one onboarding question — this is what Silas uses to build your four strategy documents.
onboarding.voiceNotDetected: Not detected — add an answer or leave blank.
onboarding.voiceTypeHint: Type your answers below — same questions as the voice flow. We'll build your four strategy documents from this.
onboarding.voiceLooksGoodBuild: Looks good — build my Creator Brain
onboarding.voiceGenerateFailed: Document generation failed (your answers are saved). Tap retry — no need to re-record.
onboarding.voiceUsuallyUnderMinute: This usually takes under a minute.
onboarding.voiceSomethingWrong: Something went wrong. Try again or type your answers.
onboarding.voiceNeedOneAnswer: Add at least one answer before generating your Creator Brain.
onboarding.voiceUploadAudioHint: One audio file with all your answers — webm, mp3, m4a, wav, or ogg. Max 24 MB.
onboarding.voiceUploadAudioInvalid: Unsupported format — use webm, mp3, m4a, wav, or ogg.
onboarding.voicePasteTextHint: Paste a transcript, notes, or a brain dump covering the questions above. We'll split it into per-question answers for you to review.
onboarding.voicePasteTextPlaceholder: Paste or type everything here — who you are, your offers, ideal customer, goals, brand voice…
onboarding.voicePasteTextQuestionHint: Cover all questions in your text — we'll organize them into answer cards next.
onboarding.voicePasteTextTooShort: Add more detail — at least a few sentences about your business.
onboarding.strategyDocUnlock: Upgrade to unlock your full Creator Brain

editors.backgroundSourceHint: Pick how the reel's backdrop is sourced. You can change this any time before render.

context.title: Context
context.subtitle: Your Creator Brain — strategy docs Silas uses for generation and discovery.
